mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.payment_no, p.order_id, p.farmer_id, p.pay_amount, p.pay_method, p.flow_no, p.pay_time, p.remark, p.operator_id, p.create_time, p.payment_account, p.recipient_name, o.order_no, o.total_amount AS order_total_amount, o.paid_amount AS order_paid_amount, (o.total_amount - o.paid_amount) AS order_unpaid_amount, u.real_name AS farmer_name, op.real_name AS operator_name, CASE p.pay_method WHEN 1 THEN '现金' WHEN 2 THEN '银行转账' WHEN 3 THEN '微信支付' WHEN 4 THEN '支付宝' ELSE '未知' END AS pay_method_name FROM t_purchase_payment p INNER JOIN t_purchase_order o ON p.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN t_farmer f ON p.farmer_id = f.id INNER JOIN t_user u ON f.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user op ON p.operator_id = op.id WHERE 1=1
AND (p.payment_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.order_id = #{orderId}
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
